description: Investigate hospital location configuration in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Hospital locations (clinics, wards, operating rooms) define the physical and logical care delivery points in VistA and are stored in the Hospital Location file (^SC, FileMan File #44). Browse at least 5 different entries in the ^SC global to identify and view both a CLINIC (Type: C) and a WARD (Type: W), ensuring the names and types are visible.
